note: website/whitepaper-reader.html sidebar button relabel: 'Light Mode' -> '← Whitepaper Overview'. The button's HREF already pointed correctly to sost-whitepaper.html (the whitepaper section overview / landing page with the four pillars, document spec, decentralization assessment, and PoW comparison tables); only the user-facing label was misleading. 'Light Mode' suggested a dark/light theme toggle, but clicking the button navigated to a different page. The new label '← Whitepaper Overview' (English, with leading back-arrow) reflects what the button actually does: returns the reader to the main page of the whitepaper section. A title= tooltip was added describing the destination explicitly. (A) website/whitepaper-reader.html line 198 — single-line label change, no HREF change, no CSS class change, no script change. (B) website/api/explorer_version.json bumped v274 -> v275. Pure HTML/JSON edit. ZERO src/, ZERO schemas, ZERO scripts, ZERO tests, ZERO consensus, ZERO wallet/payment/broadcast/release-upload changes. The 'Technical Whitepaper v4.0' string in the sidebar header (line 193) and any other version drift between whitepaper-reader.html and the v4.5 declared on sost-whitepaper.html are NOT touched in this commit; that is a separate version-sync task.
